headline: Bitcoin Die-Hard Jack Dorsey Doesn't Like Stablecoins, But Block Will Use Them Anyway
summary: Jack Dorsey has long been Bitcoin-focused. So why is Block building stablecoin support into Cash App?

headline: Block CFO interview highlights surge in profit per employee: Trial Balance
summary: Amrita Ahuja’s interview with Fortune highlights the rising importance of profit per employee metrics as companies evaluate workforce productivity in an age of automation.
